texto: Continuing on my theme of backing inclusive innovations, I am optimistic of the success of Uniphore. Man-machine communication is one of the more complex problems to solve. Uniphore's vision lends possibility of finding a solution to this very difficult problem, and the company has already made substantial progress.
explicacao: Citação de Kris Gopalakrishnan sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Continuing on my theme of backing inclusive innovations, I am optimistic of the success of Unipho…” articula sucesso, success, progress em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como termino e progress.
